creator: taavi@saast.uninet.ee
text:
If pkg_add is run as normal users, and is aborted by CTRL-C,
it recursively removes users home (or current?) directory.

Fix: 

Not known
How-To-Repeat: 
Try pkg_add ftp://a.b.c/pub/FreeBSD/packages-current/All/package.tar.gz

Press CTRL-C in, when pkg_add is still in working.
